raw_response_text:
<features>
- Clustered small flowers with four distinct petals per bloom
- Flower color palette includes bright yellow and warm orange/reddish-orange tones
- Dark reddish-brown flower buds and stems
- Blurred green grassy foliage background
</features>
<kb>
- IF flowers are clustered, four-petaled, with yellow/orange hues and reddish-brown buds/stems THEN class 45
- IF flowers are single purple bloom with a dark central flower center THEN class 44
- IF flowers are large pink/white lotus-style blooms with a prominent yellow central stamen cluster THEN class77
</kb>
<rule_check>
The target image matches the first rule: it features clustered four-petaled flowers in yellow and orange shades, with dark reddish-brown buds and stems set against a green foliage background, which exactly matches the visual patterns of the labeled examples for class 45.
</rule_check>

<response>45</response>

<features>
- Layered, soft flower petals with pale creamy-white color and subtle pink/purple tips on petal edges
- Prominent yellow central floral structure with tiny clustered dots across its surface
- Large rounded green foliage (lotus-style leaves) in the blurred background
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has layered lotus-style petals, prominent yellow central dotted receptacle, and large green aquatic foliage background] THEN 77
</kb>
<rule_check>
The target image matches the defining features of the 77 class: it has the characteristic layered petal structure of a lotus flower, the distinctive yellow central spoked/dotted receptacle, pale petals with pink edges, and large green lotus leaves in the background, aligning perfectly with the rule for class 77.
</rule_check>

<response>77</response>
